title: phaius robertsii
intro: Phaius robertsii, also known as the Roberts' Phaius, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to the Himalayan region. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often used to make decoctions or infusions, which are used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
